name: Ice Cream with Black Cherry Sauce
recipeIngredient: or other if these not available (maybe Bing)
recipeInstructions:
- In a saucepan, combine the cherries and half the sugar. Add the reserved cherry stones, lemon zest and juice, vanilla bean, and enough water to barely cover the cherries.
- Simmer for 30 minutes. Remove from heat and let cool.
- Discard the cherry stones. Strain the mixture into a bowl.
- In a double boiler, beat the egg yolks with the remaining sugar until the mixture forms a ribbon.
- Add the milk to the yolk mixture. Cook over simmering water without boiling until the custard thickens enough to coat a spoon.
- Remove from heat and let cool. Freeze the mixture in an ice cream machine and churn until set.
- Transfer the ice cream to a shallow serving bowl. Pour the cherry sauce over it and serve.
